channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Server Watch
item.description: Allows admins to do /observe to enter an invisible noclip mode

item.title: racialnpcs
item.description: allows npcs of multiple races to be created

item.title: vinconbridge
item.description: let npcs use vinconomy

item.title: race addition
item.description: adds a race to my server

item.title: RP Deity Mod
item.description: A religion and RP progression mod for Vintage Story focused on holy sites, blessings, and pilgrimage

item.title: Plant-based Fat
item.description: Fat alternative for peaceful progress

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Apotheosis Tweak - Fantasy Creature Balance
item.description: Balance tweaks to Fantasy Creatures Reborn

item.title: Fauna of the Stone Age: Casuariidae Plus
item.description: A collection of Cassowary, Emu and flightless Australian birds from human history.

item.title: Metals of Myths [ALPHA]
item.description: An addon for Improved Metallurgy that extends progression even further by adding fantasy metals.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.

item.title: Stamina Mod
item.description: Adds stamina to animals. Exhaustion slows them. Tired predators give up the chase.

item.title: Stratum - High-performance server software.
item.description: Focused on smoother multiplayer servers, better performance under load and, practical tools.

item.title: Seraph Leveling
item.description: Level-up and gain traits in a vanilla friendly way

item.title: Runescape Metals + Woods + Runecrafting
item.description: RuneScape metals & woods: mithril-runite-dragon smithing, fletching, tiered bows, mega furnaces.

item.title: TDR Temporal Stability Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks to temporal stability mechanic for the TDR server, allow building anywhere

item.title: Ritual Apotheosis
item.description: Build ancient rites from fragments. The world is your altar. Dig deep. Seek truth. Light the fires.

item.title: Rift Beasts Belong Underground FORKED
item.description: Fork of riftbeastsbelongunderground.

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: Recycle Armors
item.description: Recycle metal armors back to thier base components.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: TerraFirmaStory
item.description: Ports TerraFirmaCraft 1.21 world generation to Vintage Story

item.title: Advanced Geology
item.description: Adds new, realistic ores and stones with heavy IOG compatibility

item.title: Underwater Horrors
item.description: Adds nightmare sea monsters to Vintage Story (Sea Serpents, Kraken)

item.title: Craftable Floral Zones Plants
item.description: Makes Floral Zones plants craftable!

item.title: cheglink
item.description: Cheglink Mod to sync vintage story chat and a discord channel through ChegBot

item.title: xSkills Gilded Fork
item.description: This mod adds a beautifully designed, immersive, and user-friendly interface for xSkills.

item.title: Better Jungles (and survival modpack)
item.description: More realistic Jungles, some survival gameplay changes - ideally as part of the modpack listed below

item.title: TinkerTailor - Backpacks
item.description: More backpacks & pouches for the veteran seraph. Made with love & pain, No AI.
